withdrawal_goal.note: Reach $1000 total account value (positions + cash) before first withdrawal. Commissions already paid make it not worth withdrawing earlier.

positions.notes: Largest position, 42% of portfolio. May 20 earnings is biggest catalyst.
Healthcare diversifier, non-correlated to AI trade. GLP-1 leader.

Q2 FY26 earnings June 3: beat EPS ($2.44 vs $2.40), slight rev miss. AI rev $10.8B (2x YoY). AI Q3 guidance $16B (3x). Full-year $100B AI guidance maintained. Stock -15% on Hock Tan not raising FY guidance. Bottomed $386.62 Jun 5, recovering to $411.35 by Jun 18. Jun 22 ex-div $0.65.

positions.catalyst: Ongoing AI foundry demand; geopolitical risk monitor
positions.notes: Foundry monopoly. Taiwan Strait geopolitical risk = binary tail risk override. TSM closed $462.12 on June 18 — past TP1 ($435) and at 52-week high ($465.22). TP1 trim recommended: sell 0.112 shares, net P&L +$5.27 after $3 commission.
